message:
test(core): add 20 unit tests for terminal_session.rs

Comprehensive tests for TerminalSession: kitty keyboard escape helpers
(enable/disable/roundtrip), SessionOptions exhaustive construction and
clone independence, sync-end constant verification, and test-helpers-gated
tests for new_for_tests construction, set_mouse_capture idempotency and
toggle roundtrip, cleanup flag clearing and idempotency, options getter,
and debug format. Coverage goes from 6 to 26 tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
